# Celestial Tapestry: A Reflection of God's Sovereignty
## Scripture
The scripture for today is Psalm 104:1-2, "Praise the Lord, O my soul. O Lord my God, you are very great; you are clothed with splendor and majesty, covering yourself with light as with a garment, stretching out the heavens like a tent."

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the vast expanse of the night sky, we are reminded of God's majestic sovereignty over all creation. The stars, planets, and galaxies are like intricate threads in a celestial tapestry, woven together by the Master Creator. Just as a skilled weaver carefully crafts each strand to create a beautiful work of art, God has carefully ordained every detail of our lives and the universe. His sovereignty is not just a distant concept, but a present reality that guides us through life's joys and challenges.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial tapestry, we are humbled by your greatness and majesty. Help us to trust in your sovereignty, knowing that you are weaving every thread of our lives into a beautiful work of art. May we find comfort in your presence and guidance, and may our lives reflect the beauty and wonder of your creation. Thank you for being our Rock and our Redeemer. Amen.
